detector: grounding = mean( tkB_L31 cosine-logit-lens topk, margin_tk_L31 ); score_hallucination = -(grounding - per_object_mean)
validity: object-identity prior alone=0.60; per-object-demean RAISES to 0.82 => genuine per-image grounding, not frequency artifact; freq-halluc corr ~0
key_findings: COSINE to object unembedding row works; softmax-prob logit-lens does NOT
best at LAST layer (L31), monotonic with depth
signal#1 (pairwise looseness) real but weaker and redundant on top of grounding
intra-image contrastive margin ~= absolute; per-object (SAGE mean-shift) calibration is what helps
